title: Conditional "OR" on Automation Recipies

posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I noticed that when I create an Automation Recipie there isn’t the conditional “OR” on the recipie making:

For example: I want the automation to be executed when an status column changes to “this” OR “that”, then do something.

I can only select ONE STATUS per Automation

The only solution to this is to duplicate the recipie select each Status on each Recipie.
Could it be changed?
